title: Luffy Launches Wapol
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on luffy launches wapol, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Luffy Launches Wapol. Luffy defeats Wapol and destroys the symbol of his selfish rule, clearing the way for Drum’s rebirth. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll go ahead and scout out the situation first.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: The rest of you can come after that.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Jeez, if you're that scared, just wait back with the others!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: what the hell are you doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Sorry about that. Your clothes made you look like the enemy from a distance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So you guys hiked up here too?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: usopp, I thought you said you weren't gonna hike?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hahaha, don't be stupid. I'm the kind of guy who just climbs mountains because they're there. This one was bit of a doozy but nothing the great Usopp couldn't handle.

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: We took the ROPEWAY UP HERE.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: On our way up, we were attacked by a giant candor. 'Course, I was a little surprised at first but I instinctively sprang into action!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It tried to dive right for my heart but I, with the grace of a ballet dancer, effortlessly dodged its deadly strike!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So what've you been up to since coming up here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: After missing, the candor tried to fly back up but I, the great captain, would not allow such a thing! I quickly threw a lasso around its neck and as I tightened it, I yelled,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Then... that thing flying through the air just a moment ago... was really wapol!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh that's right. Guys, guys. I found us a new crewmate.

summary: This part highlights luffy launches wapol and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
